articles.title: NVIDIA Launches Ising, the World’s First Open AI Models to Accelerate the Path to Useful Quantum Computers
articles.summary: NVIDIA today announced the world’s first family of open source quantum AI models, NVIDIA Ising, designed to help researchers and enterprises build quantum processors capable of running useful applications.

articles.title: NVIDIA AI Ecosystem Expands as Marvell Joins Forces Through NVLink Fusion
articles.summary: NVIDIA and Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) today announced a strategic partnership to connect Marvell to the NVIDIA AI factory and AI-RAN ecosystem through NVIDIA NVLink Fusion™, offering customers building on NVIDIA architectures greater choice and flexibility in developing next-generation infrastructure.
